title: Saitama
summary:
Saitama (埼玉, さいたま) most commonly refers to:

Saitama Prefecture, a prefecture of Japan
Saitama (city), the capital of Saitama Prefecture
Saitama (One-Punch Man), title character of One-Punch Man
Saitama may also refer to:

Places
Kita-Saitama District, Saitama
Minami-Saitama District, Saitama

Sports
Saitama SC, a football club
Saitama Seibu Lions, a baseball club
 Saitama Ageo Medics, a volleyball club

Saitama Super Arena, an arena in Saitama

Transportation
Saitama-Shintoshin Station, a railway station in Ōmiya-ku
Saitama New Urban Transit, operator of the New Shuttle transportation system
Saitama Rapid Railway Line, a railway line

Other
Television Saitama, a television station in Saitama Prefecture
5618 Saitama, a main-belt asteroid
